Virtual Estimator Commissions
Download commission sheet
⬇️
💼 Let's Talk Commissions!

Welcome team! This is your go-to guide for getting your commission sheets done right, on time, and without headaches. Follow these rules and keep that money flowing 💰

⏰ Timing Is Everything

Commission sheets are based on completed moves only for that payroll period.

  • Every Monday morning, block off your first hour ⏳
    → This is your dedicated commission time.
  • Your sheet is due ONE HOUR after your official start time.
🧾 Filling Out Your Sheet
  • ✅ Use the correct sheet (the one that applies to YOU)
  • ✅ ALL fields are required — no blanks!
  • ✅ ALL formulas must remain intact

🚨 If anything is missing or incorrect, your sheet WILL be sent back.

⚡ Speed Matters

If payroll is late, we cannot guarantee it will be processed on time.

  • If your sheet gets sent back:
    👉 Fix it ASAP and resubmit immediately.
📧 How to Submit
  • Include Nick AND Brian on every email
    → This ensures nothing gets missed if someone is out
  • Attach your sheet as a FILE (not a link) 📎
  • Name your file:
    👉 Your Name – Commission Sheet
🌴 Out of Office? No Problem

If you're going to be out of town:

  • Fill out everything you can on the sheet
  • Leave "Total Collected for all CIDs" blank
  • Send it to Nick & Brian to complete

📌 Reason: Estimator auto-pay isn't always 100% accurate

🆘 Need Help?

Don't get stuck!
📞 Reach out to Nick or Brian anytime
We're here to help you get it done right the first time.

Global Rules for All Regulated Markets

🚫 No Coupons / Discounts
Albuquerque · Boston · Chicago 1 · Chicago 2 · DC (30+ mi) · El Paso (NM) · Mobile (30+ mi) · Newport News (30+ mi) · Portland 1 · Portland 2 · Richmond (30+ mi) · Virginia Beach (30+ mi)
🚫 No Free Kitchen Packs
Albuquerque · Chicago 1 · Chicago 2 · New City · Portland 1 · Portland 2 · Seattle
⚠️ No Coupons / Discounts (W&M Mileage Regulation)
Birmingham (30+ mi) · Cherry Hill PA · Detroit (40+ mi) · Las Vegas · New City · Pittsburgh · Portland 2 · Rhode Island · Seattle
🔀 Dual Authority Locations
Charlotte NC/SC · Charlotte South NC/SC · Chattanooga TN/NC/GA · Cincinnati OH/KY · Denton TX/OK · El Paso TX/NM · Fort Collins CO/WY · Hilton Head SC/GA · Jacksonville FL/GA · Kansas City MO/KS · New Jersey NJ/PA · Omaha NE/IA · Portland OR/WA · Rhode Island MA/RI
📦 Packing Doesn't Auto-Populate — Must Manually Add Materials:
Alabama · Illinois · Louisiana · Massachusetts · Michigan · Nevada · New Jersey · New Mexico · Oregon · Pennsylvania · Rhode Island · Virginia · Washington

Backhaul Information

📋 Backhaul SOP
📝 Backhaul Lead Form
Fill out the form above to send to backhaul team
Form Includes 9 Questions (ALL REQUIRED):
  • CID
  • Customer Name
  • Weight
  • Packing
  • Pick-up Dates
  • Origin
  • Destination
  • Direct Service Price
  • Customer Budget & Flexibility
⚠️ Key Questions to Ask Customer:
  • Pick-up/Drop-off Flexibility: Ask if customer has flexibility with pick-up or drop-off dates
  • Budget: Ask customer their budget for the move
✓ Likelihood of Backhaul:
Budget is within 30% of direct service price AND customer has 1+ week flexibility on pick-up/drop-off dates = Likely something will work
🔴 IMPORTANT - DO NOT BOOK UNTIL:
  • Backhaul team emails you to book the job
  • Customer has direct service pricing estimate in CMS1 first
  • Form submission DOES NOT guarantee a backhaul will be found
  • Do NOT change pricing from direct service until backhaul confirms
✓ ONCE BACKHAUL CONFIRMS:
  • Send a quote out with the correct price that backhaul confirmed
  • Use Option 2 without insurance
  • Include the backhaul customer remarks in the HUB
❓ What is a Backhaul?

All My Sons has over 100 offices across the country. We're constantly delivering items to different cities, and after completing a direct service delivery, our truck must return empty to its home office.

Here's where backhauling comes in:

Scenario: Our truck just delivered items to Miami and is returning to Dallas. At the same time, another customer needs their items moved FROM Dallas TO Miami.

Solution: Instead of sending an empty truck back, we use that same truck to move the other customer's items. Since the truck is already driving that route and would be empty anyway, we can offer a discounted rate for this move.

⚠️ Important: This is NOT a standard service All My Sons offers. Backhauling is a special opportunity that only works when the timing and route perfectly align with our existing deliveries.
